data.title: Blackstone names Katie Keenan CEO of BREIT, Core+ global head. She replaces Wesley LePatner after her passing.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Blackstone (NYSE: BX) revealed changes in senior leadership in their Real Estate sector. Katie Keenan has been named as the new Chief Executive Officer and Director of Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. ("BREIT") and appointed as the Global Head of the Core+ Real Estate division. This update comes after the unfortunate passing of Wesley M. LePatner on July 28, 2025, who previously held both positions. Ms. Keenan, with extensive experience at Blackstone, now steps into these key roles.

data.title: Bitcoin could surge to $136,000 by October with MACD signaling a bullish breakout. Immediate resistance at $117,900.
data.description: Analysis of Bitcoin's technical trends indicates the possibility of a surge to $136,000 within the next 4-6 weeks. Key resistance is currently at $117,900, serving as a crucial point for further upward movement.

data.title: NMHI CEO James Li to discuss tokenization and XRP at XRP Seoul 2025 Global Conference on Sept 21.
data.description: Chairman and CEO of Nature's Miracle Holding Inc., Tie "James" Li, is set to present on "The Power of Tokenization Shaping a New Digital World with XRP" at the upcoming XRP Seoul 2025 Global event on September 21, 2025. Li will share insights on the topic at the event, where attendees will have the opportunity to learn more about the impact of tokenization on the digital landscape. The presentation is scheduled to take place on the specified date.

data.title: Investors in KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Oct. 14, 2025 about class action securities lawsuit - KLC.
data.description: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has alerted investors in KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (NYSE: KLC) about a class-action securities lawsuit. The legal action aims to help investors recoup losses related to the company's stock. The class definition includes all investors who have been affected by the alleged misconduct. This announcement was made on September 19, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Scholastic Corp. shares dropped as company reported Q1 loss; Sales at $225.6M missed est. of $238.91M. GAAP net loss $71.1M. EBITDA improved 8%. Children's Book Publishing & Distribution revenue rose 4% to $109.4M.
data.description: Scholastic Corp. (NASDAQ: SCHL) experienced a decline in share price following the announcement of its fiscal 2026 first-quarter results. The company reported an adjusted loss per share of $2.52, missing the anticipated $2.44, with total sales at $225.6 million falling short of the expected $238.91 million. Revenue saw a 5% decrease from $237.2 million compared to the previous year, attributed to weakened Education Solutions sales in a challenging financial environment. The GAAP net loss expanded to $71.1 million, or $2.83 per diluted share, from $62.5 million, or $2.21 per share, in the same period last year. Adjusted EBITDA showed an 8% improvement with a loss of $55.7 million. Children's Book Publishing and Distribution revenue saw a 4% increase to $109.4 million. Book Fairs revenue rose by 18% to $34.1 million, while Book Clubs revenue dropped by 33% to $1.8 million.

data.title: InterCure acquires ISHI, accessing premium U.S. cannabis tech and brands, advancing commercial expansion.
data.description: InterCure has achieved a significant milestone in its commercial expansion strategy with the acquisition of a prominent cannabis company. This move provides access to top American brands and cutting-edge cultivation technologies. This transaction signifies a major step forward for InterCure in the cannabis industry.

data.title: Investors in Charter Communications, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before Oct 14, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit for investors in Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR). The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors who suffered damages due to alleged misconduct by the Company. The class members affected by this legal action are those who held shares in Charter Communications, Inc. during the specified period. This development highlights significant legal proceedings impacting the company's stock value and underscores the potential financial risks involved in investing in such securities.

data.title: US soup market valued at USD 5.9 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 7.3 billion by 2032, growing at 2.5% CAGR.
data.description: In Dublin, the United States soup market is expected to experience significant growth according to a report by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was valued at USD 5.9 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach approximately USD 7.3 billion by 2032, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.5% from 2025 to 2032. This new market analysis for 2025 offers a comprehensive examination of the dynamics, opportunities, and competitive landscape of the United States soup market for the upcoming years.

data.title: Heritage Distilling change its Nasdaq ticker to IPST from CASK to align with their focus on $IP token treasury strategy.
data.description: Heritage Distilling, trading under the ticker symbol $CASK on Nasdaq, will be switching its symbol to IPST to align with the company's emphasis on its $IP token treasury strategy.

data.title: Ryan Dohrn wins 2025 Smart Speaker Award in Career Optimization, recognized by Smart Meetings Mag.
data.description: In Augusta, Georgia on September 19, 2025, Ryan Dohrn, the Emmy Award-winning speaker and founder of Sales Training World, was announced as a recipient of the 2025 Smart Speaker Award by Smart Meetings Magazine. Dohrn was recognized in the "Career Optimizers" category for his exceptional contributions. This award is presented annually to highlight outstanding keynote speakers.

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf's credit rating upgraded by S&P Global Ratings, a world leader in banking and shopping.
data.description: North Canton, Ohio - On September 19, 2025, Diebold Nixdorf, a global leader in revolutionizing banking and shopping experiences, disclosed that S&P Global Ratings (S&P) raised its credit rating. The upgrade highlights the company's enhanced financial performance and...

data.title: CBRE Group, Inc. to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 23 at 6:55am, conference call at 8:30am. Webcast available.
data.description: CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE: CBRE) is set to announce its third quarter financial results for 2025 on Thursday, October 23, 2025, at approximately 6:55 a.m. Eastern time. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day. The event will be live webcasted via the Investor Relations section of the company’s website at www.cbre.com. The release and discussion will provide valuable insights to investors and stakeholders keen on the company's performance.

data.title: Acclinate named to Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing private companies in the US. Alabama-based health equity company focuses on community-powered engagement and inclusive clinical trial enrollment.
data.description: A company based in Birmingham, Alabama, called Acclinate has recently been recognized for its innovative approach to health equity. The company focuses on inclusive clinical trial enrollment through community-powered engagement. They were honored by being included in the prestigious Inc. 5000 list, which showcases the fastest-growing private companies in the U.S. The recognition highlights Acclinate's success and growth in the industry.

data.title: All Coast Funding and Beachfront Credit Services partner to expand lending options, introduce Credit Pulse™ for financial wellness.
data.description: A recent partnership in Orange County, California, has significantly improved loan access and approval rates for consumers. This collaboration, which took place on September 19, 2025, involves All Coast Funding, a fintech company accessible at allcoastfunding.com. Through this alliance, consumers and businesses across the country have benefitted from enhanced access to loans and increased approval rates. Additionally, the partnership provides individuals with valuable financial wellness tools, empowering them to make informed decisions about their financial futures.

data.title: Nutex Health (NUTX) faces securities suit alleging fraud & financial misstatements. Investors urged to contact Hagens Berman.
data.description: Investors who have incurred losses are urged to reach out to Hagens Berman in relation to Nutex Health Inc. (NASDAQ: NUTX), a company that operates micro-hospitals and healthcare facilities. A class-action lawsuit has been filed against Nutex Health Inc., a publicly traded entity, in San Francisco on September 19, 2025. The lawsuit alleges various legal violations.
